SEARCH:
程序包 org.graphstream.stream.file

类 FileSinkImages

java.lang.Object
org.graphstream.stream.file.FileSinkImages
所有已实现的接口:
AttributeSink, ElementSink, FileSink, Sink
public abstract class FileSinkImages extends Object implements FileSink
Output graph in image files.

Given a prefix "dir/prefix_" and an output policy, this sink will output graph in an image file which name is prefix + a growing counter.

Then images can be processed to produce a movie. For example, with mencoder, the following produce high quality movie : 


 #!/bin/bash

 EXT=png
 BITRATE=2M
 FPS=15
 PREFIX=$1
 OUTPUT=$2

 ffmpeg -framerate $FPS -i "$PREFIX%06d.$EXT" -b:v $BITRATE -r $FPS -an $OUTPUT

    • setLayoutStepPerFrame

      public void setLayoutStepPerFrame(int spf)
      Set the amount of step before output a new image. This is used only in ByLayoutStepOutput output policy.
      参数:
      spf - step per frame

      public void setLayoutStepAfterStabilization(int sas)

      sas - step after stabilization.

      Set the stabilization limit of the layout used to compute coordinates of nodes. See Layout.setStabilizationLimit(double) for more informations about this limit.

      limit -

    • begin

      public void begin(OutputStream stream) throws IOException
      从接口复制的说明: FileSink
      Begin the output of the given stream of graph events. The graph events can come from any input (implementation of
      @link 无效 
      Source
      or you can directly use the methods inherited from Sink. Once the writing is started using begin(), you must close it using FileSink.end() when done to ensure data is correctly stored in the file.
      指定者:
      begin 在接口中 FileSink
      参数:
      stream - The file stream where to output the graph events.
      抛出:
      IOException - If an I/O error occurs while writing.

    • begin

      public void begin(Writer writer) throws IOException
      从接口复制的说明: FileSink
      Begin the output of the given stream of graph events. The graph events can come from any input (implementation of
      @link 无效 
      Source
      or you can directly use the methods inherited from Sink. Once the writing is started using begin(), you must close it using FileSink.end() when done to ensure data is correctly stored in the file.
      指定者:
      begin 在接口中 FileSink
      参数:
      writer - The writer where to output the graph events.
      抛出:
      IOException - If an I/O error occurs while writing.

    • begin

      public void begin(String prefix) throws IOException
      从接口复制的说明: FileSink
      Begin the output of the given stream of graph events. The graph events can come from any input (implementation of
      @link 无效 
      Source
      or you can directly use the methods inherited from Sink. Once the writing is started using begin(), you must close it using FileSink.end() when done to ensure data is correctly stored in the file.
      指定者:
      begin 在接口中 FileSink
      参数:
      prefix - The name of the file where to output the graph events.
      抛出:
      IOException - If an I/O error occurs while writing.

      从接口复制的说明: FileSink

      end 在接口中 FileSink
      抛出:
      IOException

    • writeAll

      public void writeAll(Graph g, OutputStream stream) throws IOException
      从接口复制的说明: FileSink
      Write the current graph state in one big non-interruptible operation. This operation is a "snapshot" of the graph, it will never convey the dynamics of the graph. To ensure you store the graph "as it evolves in time" you must use the FileSink.begin(Writer) or FileSink.begin(OutputStream) or FileSink.begin(String) as soon as the graph appears (or any source of graph event, any descendant of
      @link 无效 
      Source
      will do).
      指定者:
      writeAll 在接口中 FileSink
      参数:
      g - The graph to send as events to the file.
      stream - The stream where the graph is sent.
      抛出:
      IOException - if an I/O error occurs while writing.

    • writeAll

      public void writeAll(Graph g, Writer writer) throws IOException
      从接口复制的说明: FileSink
      Write the current graph state in one big non-interruptible operation. This operation is a "snapshot" of the graph, it will never convey the dynamics of the graph. To ensure you store the graph "as it evolves in time" you must use the FileSink.begin(Writer) or FileSink.begin(OutputStream) or FileSink.begin(String) as soon as the graph appears (or any source of graph event, any descendant of
      @link 无效 
      Source
      will do).
      指定者:
      writeAll 在接口中 FileSink
      参数:
      g - The graph to send as events to the file.
      writer - The writer where the graph is sent.
      抛出:
      IOException - if an I/O error occurs while writing.

    • writeAll

      public void writeAll(Graph g, String filename) throws IOException
      从接口复制的说明: FileSink
      Write the current graph state in one big non-interruptible operation. This operation is a "snapshot" of the graph, it will never convey the dynamics of the graph. To ensure you store the graph "as it evolves in time" you must use the FileSink.begin(OutputStream) or FileSink.begin(String) as soon as the graph appears (or any source of graph event, any descendant of
      @link 无效 
      Source
      will do).
      指定者:
      writeAll 在接口中 FileSink
      参数:
      g - The graph to send as events to the file.
      filename - Name of the file to write.
      抛出:
      IOException - if an I/O error occurs while writing.

      An edge was inserted in graph.

      edgeAdded 在接口中 ElementSink
      参数:
      sourceId - Identifier of the graph where the edge was added.
      edgeId - Identifier of the added edge.
      fromNodeId - Identifier of the first node of the edge.
      toNodeId - Identifier of the second node of the edge.
      directed - If true, the edge is directed.

      nodeId - Identifier of the removed node.

    • stepBegins

      public void stepBegins(String sourceId, long timeId, double step)
      从接口复制的说明: ElementSink

      Since dynamic graphs are based on discrete event modifications, the notion of step is defined to simulate elapsed time between events. So a step is a event that occurs in the graph, it does not modify it but it gives a kind of timestamp that allow the tracking of the progress of the graph over the time.

      This kind of event is useful for dynamic algorithms that listen to the dynamic graph and need to measure the time in the graph's evolution.

      指定者:
      stepBegins 在接口中 ElementSink
      参数:
      sourceId - Identifier of the graph where the step starts.
      timeId - A numerical value that may give a timestamp to track the evolution of the graph over the time.
      另请参阅:
      • Sink

    • usage

      public static void usage()

    • main

      public static void main(String... args) throws IOException
